notes:
v0.10.0 Update
- Added shared exchange quotes and execution across virtual wallets and actor-sheet currencies.
- Added atomic virtual balance batches for multi-currency changes.
- Exchange execution is recalculated by the active GM, serialized with other currency mutations, and rounded without creating extra base-unit value.

announcement.title: 🔔 GlitchSmith Library v0.10.0
announcement.content:
GlitchSmith Library v0.10.0 adds shared currency exchange services for connected modules.

  • Modules can request exchange quotes and execute conversions across virtual wallets and actor-sheet currencies.
  • Virtual balance batches validate and save multiple currency changes in one operation.
  • The active GM recalculates exchanges, enforces currency increments, and serializes balance changes to prevent duplicate or invalid results.
